prompts.title: Headline & Copy Testing
prompts.prompt: Generate 3 alternative headlines/copy for [ORIGINAL_POST]. For each: (1) Why it's different, (2) What audience segment prefers it, (3) Predicted engagement lift, (4) Test plan, (5) Success criteria.

prompts.title: Best Time to Post Analysis
prompts.prompt: Analyze optimal posting times for [COMPANY]. Data: [HISTORICAL_POSTS]. Recommend: (1) Best day/time per platform, (2) Frequency, (3) Content type per time, (4) Seasonal adjustments, (5) Why these times work.

prompts.title: Platform-Specific Optimization
prompts.prompt: Optimize [POST] for [PLATFORM] algorithm. Current: [CURRENT_PERFORMANCE]. Recommend: (1) Format change, (2) Hashtag strategy, (3) CTA adjustment, (4) Media recommendations, (5) Engagement tactics.
